revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:五黄土星]]
{{More citations needed|date=January 2011|qq=}} {| class="floatright wikitable" style="text-align:center; font-family:serif;" |+ Post-Heaven Lo Shu Square |- | 4 || 9 || 2 |- | 3 || style="background-color:#FF80C0" | 5 || 7 |- | 8 || 1 || 6 |} '''Goō Dosei''' (五黄土星) is one of the {{ill|Nine Stars|ja|九星|1=Nine Stars|2=ja|3=九星|lt=Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Stars|qq=}} used in {{ill|Calendar|en|Calendar|qid=Q12132|lt=calendars|1=Calendar}} and {{ill|Divination|en|Divination|qid=Q1043197|lt=fortune-telling|1=Divination}}. It occupies the center position in the Post-Heaven Lo Shu Square and holds a special meaning among the Nine Stars. It is considered a powerful star that governs the other eight stars. Compared to {{ill|Nikoku Dosei|ja|二黒土星|1=Second Black Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikoku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Second Black Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikoku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Second Black Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikoku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Second Black Earth Star|qq=}} and {{ill|Happaku Dosei|1=Eighth White Earth Star|ja|八白土星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Happaku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Eighth White Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Happaku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Eighth White Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Happaku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Eighth White Earth Star|qq=}}, which also belong to the earth element, Goō Dosei has a stronger earth energy. Among the Nine Stars, other earth-associated stars include Nikoku Dosei and Happaku Dosei, but Goō Dosei represents destructive and decaying forces, symbolizing elements such as deserts, wastelands, burial grounds, landslides, and even the Earth itself. Most of its symbolic meanings are unfavorable or extreme. In terms of directional influence, locations assigned to Goō Dosei are considered “{{ill|Goōsha|ja|五黄殺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goōsha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goōsha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11548077}}” (Five Yellow Killings), while the opposite direction is “{{ill|Ankensatsu|ja|暗剣殺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ankensatsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ankensatsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ankensatsu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11548077}}” (Dark Sword Killing), both of which are regarded as unlucky directions. However, people born under this star are believed to possess strong fortune. Additionally, those born in the Year of the Tiger under Goō Dosei are called “{{ill|Goō no Tora|ja|五黄の寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goō no Tora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goō no Tora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goō no Tora|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 寅|1=yín|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q16683683}}” and are said to have strong personalities. In the daily Nine Star cycle, Goō Dosei appears every 9 days (every 8 days apart) in both yang and yin cycles. However, during the intercalary transition of the Nine Stars, the interval between Goō Dosei days extends to 14 days. == Attributes == * {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|qid=Q218652|lt=Five Elements (Wuxing)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)}} - {{ill|Earth (wuxing)|ru|Земля (у-син)|mn|Шороо (махбод)|uk|Земля (У-сін)|als|Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|bcl|Daga (wuxing)|vi|Thổ (Ngũ hành)|zh|Earth (土)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|lt=Earth (土)}} * {{ill|Bagua|en|Bagua|qid=Q340846|lt=Bagua|1=Bagua}} - None ({{ill|Taiji (philosophy)|en|Taiji (philosophy)|qid=Q53685|lt=Taiji|1=Taiji (philosophy)}}) * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} - {{ill|Tsuchinoe (戊)|ja|戊|zh|戊|gan|戊|hak|Vú (thiên-kôn)|ja|Tsuchinoe|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|vi|Mậu (Thiên can)|za|Fouh (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Bō͘ (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|戊|zh|戊|qq=}}, {{ill|Tsuchinoto (己)|ja|己|zh|己|gan|己|hak|Kí (thiên-kôn)|ja|Tsuchinoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|vi|Kỷ (Thiên can)|za|Geij (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kí (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|己 (天干)|zh|己 (天干)|qq=}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} - None * Season - {{ill|Doyō (season)|ja|土用|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doyō (season)|lt=Doyō}} (All Four Seasons) * Direction - Center * Month - None * Time - None * Number - Five, Ten * Color - Yellow * Taste - Sweet == Symbolic Meanings == * Foundation, violence, graves, death, {{ill|cancer|ja|癌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cancer|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cancer|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cancer|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 悪性腫瘍|1=Cancer|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q12078}}, recurrence of old illnesses, destruction, {{ill|Funeral director|en|Funeral director|qid=Q316490|lt=funeral industry|1=Funeral director}}, waste disposal, tumors, sweet flavors, {{ill|Eaves|en|Eaves|qid=Q163972|lt=eaves|1=Eaves}}, creation, {{ill|assassins|ja|刺客|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/assassins|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/assassins|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/assassins|1=assassins|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11268171}}, scandals, fermentation * Waste materials, natural disasters, center, nuclear energy, heat, control, rebellion, core, panic, void, yellow, greed, bankruptcy, unemployment, revival (reboot) * Large intestine, constipation, diarrhea == Relationships with Other Stars == * Generating Cycle (相生) - {{ill|Roppaku Kinsei|1=Sixth White Metal Star|ja|六白金星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Roppaku Kinsei|13=User:Immanuelle/Sixth White Metal Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Roppaku Kinsei|13=User:Immanuelle/Sixth White Metal Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Roppaku Kinsei|13=User:Immanuelle/Sixth White Metal Star|qq=}} (Earth produces Metal), {{ill|Shichiseki Kinsei|1=Seventh Red Metal Star|ja|七赤金星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichiseki Kinsei|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventh Red Metal Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichiseki Kinsei|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventh Red Metal Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichiseki Kinsei|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventh Red Metal Star|qq=}} (Earth produces Metal), {{ill|Kyūshi Kasei|1=Ninth Purple Fire Star|ja|九紫火星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyūshi Kasei|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninth Purple Fire Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyūshi Kasei|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninth Purple Fire Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyūshi Kasei|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninth Purple Fire Star|qq=}} (Fire produces Earth) * Overcoming Cycle (相克) - {{ill|Ippaku Suisei|ja|一白水星|1=First White Water Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ippaku Suisei|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ippaku Suisei|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ippaku Suisei|13=User:Immanuelle/First White Water Star|qq=}} (Earth overcomes Water), {{ill|Sanpeki Mokusei|ja|三碧木星|1=Third Blue Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpeki Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Third Blue Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpeki Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Third Blue Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpeki Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Third Blue Wood Star|qq=}} (Wood overcomes Earth), {{ill|Shiroku Mokusei|ja|四緑木星|1=Fourth Green Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiroku Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Fourth Green Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiroku Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Fourth Green Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiroku Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Fourth Green Wood Star|qq=}} (Wood overcomes Earth) * Harmonious Relationship (比和) - {{ill|Nikoku Dosei|ja|二黒土星|1=Second Black Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikoku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Second Black Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikoku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Second Black Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikoku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Second Black Earth Star|qq=}}, Goō Dosei, {{ill|Happaku Dosei|1=Eighth White Earth Star|ja|八白土星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Happaku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Eighth White Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Happaku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Eighth White Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Happaku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Eighth White Earth Star|qq=}} == Years in Which Goō Dosei Occupies the Center == Years in which the remainder when divided by 9 is 6 are Goō Dosei years. The years marked with ※ are “Goō no Tora” (五黄の寅), occurring in a 36-year cycle. ‥‥ - {{ill|1950|en|1950|qid=Q18597|lt=1950|1=1950}}※ - {{ill|1959|en|1959|qid=Q5302|lt=1959|1=1959}} - {{ill|1968|en|1968|qid=Q2644|lt=1968|1=1968}} - {{ill|1977|en|1977|qid=Q2481|lt=1977|1=1977}} - {{ill|1986|en|1986|qid=Q2430|lt=1986|1=1986}}※ - {{ill|1995|en|1995|qid=Q2068|lt=1995|1=1995}} - {{ill|2004|en|2004|qid=Q2014|lt=2004|1=2004}} - {{ill|2013|en|2013|qid=Q1998|lt=2013|1=2013}} - {{ill|2022|en|2022|qid=Q49625|lt=2022|1=2022}}※ - {{ill|2031|en|2031|qid=Q12794|lt=2031|1=2031}} - {{ill|2040|en|2040|qid=Q12108|lt=2040|1=2040}} - {{ill|2049|en|2049|qid=Q49924|lt=2049|1=2049}} - {{ill|2058|en|2058|qid=Q49933|lt=2058|1=2058}}※ - {{ill|2067|en|2067|qid=Q890597|lt=2067|1=2067}} - {{ill|2076|en|2076|qid=Q890563|lt=2076|1=2076}} - ‥‥ * In years when Goō Dosei occupies the center (always occurring in the Years of the {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q16683683}}, {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (Zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (Zodiac)|qq=}}, {{ill|Monkey (zodiac)|en|Monkey (zodiac)|qid=Q740674|lt=Monkey (申)|1=Monkey (zodiac)}}, and {{ill|Pig (zodiac)|en|Pig (zodiac)|qid=Q877261|lt=Pig (亥)|1=Pig (zodiac)}}, known as the Four Meng Years), significant changes, transformations, wars, earthquakes, disasters, and incidents are believed to occur frequently. The reasoning behind this is that in {{ill|Four Pillars of Destiny|en|Four Pillars of Destiny|qid=Q843288|lt=Four Pillars of Destiny|1=Four Pillars of Destiny}}, these years correspond to years in which the {{ill|Yongshen|ja|用神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yongshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yongshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yongshen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} attains {{ill|Changsheng|ja|十二運#十二運の応用|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Changsheng|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Changsheng|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Changsheng|1=Changsheng|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11404820}} (Longevity), which is said to facilitate the emergence and rise of new enterprises and events. Specifically: * {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} attains Longevity in Tiger (寅) * {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} attains Longevity in Snake (巳) * {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} attains Longevity in Monkey (申) * {{ill|Jia|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} attains Longevity in Boar (亥)
== See Also == * {{ill|Goōsha|ja|五黄殺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goōsha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goōsha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11548077}} * {{ill|Ankensatsu|ja|暗剣殺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ankensatsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ankensatsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ankensatsu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11548077}}
Despite their names, the Nine Stars are not related to celestial objects like the planets in the {{ill|Solar System|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Solar System|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Solar System|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Solar System|qq=}}. == Nine Stars Comparison Chart == {{main|{{ill|Nine Stars|ja|九星|1=Nine Stars|2=ja|3=九星|lt=Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine
